title: Gateway Parity: Merchant Statements + Settlement Import

features.name: Per-Merchant Statement Generator
features.description: New gateway-merchant-statement edge function generates monthly merchant statements in JSON/CSV with full charge/payout/refund line items and summary analytics.

features.name: Provider Settlement Import & Compare
features.description: New gateway-settlement-import edge function imports Stripe/Flutterwave/PayPal settlement files, compares against KOB ledger, and records mismatches for admin resolution.

features.name: Live API Status Page
features.description: Connected ApiStatusPage to api-health edge function for real-time service status display with refresh and FAPI compliance details.

features.name: API Playground Enhancements
features.description: Added sandbox-only auth warning banner, 2 new endpoints (Generate Test Data, List Banks), and OAuth docs link.

features.name: Edge Function Modernization
features.description: Migrated api-health from deprecated serve import to native Deno.serve.

features.name: Sandbox vs Production Auth Documentation
features.description: Added authentication environment rules section to developer quickstart guide.

title: Integration Readiness Audit — Zero-Gaps Documentation & API Alignment

features.name: Master Documentation Pack
features.description: Created integration-contracts.md, feature-matrix.md (170 features across 16 domains), and test-plan.md with 4 E2E journeys

features.name: Public Developer Docs
features.description: Quickstart guides for Merchants, Developers, and Institutions with XAF examples and Cameroon phone formatting. Webhook integration guide, error codes reference, and status lifecycle reference.

features.name: Postman Collection Alignment
features.description: Added 8 missing folders to Postman collection: Wallets, Escrow, Instant Payouts, Treasury, Compliance Screening, SLA Monitoring, POS & Commerce. Total endpoints now ~190.

features.name: Final Audit Report
features.description: Comprehensive integration readiness report with feature matrix, security controls checklist (20/20 passed), known limitations, and production readiness statement.

features.name: Smart Dashboard Router
features.description: All login flows now route through DashboardRouter which redirects each account type (admin, merchant, institution, developer, personal) to their correct portal — eliminating cross-contamination

features.name: UserProfileMenu Role-Aware Navigation
features.description: My Dashboard link now uses variant-based path mapping instead of hardcoded /dashboard

features.name: Notification Translation Strings
features.description: 28 new translatable strings (EN + FR) for KYB/KYC/onboarding notification pipeline

title: E2E Data-Flow Consistency & Admin Notification Pipeline

features.name: Admin Notification Helper
features.description: Shared admin-notify.ts helper that notifies all admin users via app_notifications on KYB/KYC/onboarding submissions

features.name: KYB/KYC Submit Notifications
features.description: business-kyc-submit, gateway-merchant-kyb, kyc-submit, identity-onboarding now create admin notifications on submission

features.name: Review Decision Notifications
features.description: gateway-merchant-kyb-review and admin-kyb-verify now create in-app notifications for users on approval/rejection

features.name: Merchant KYB Review via Edge Function
features.description: MerchantManagement admin page now calls gateway-merchant-kyb-review instead of direct DB update, ensuring audit logs and notifications fire

features.name: TPP Review Audit Logging
features.description: TPPRegistrationReview now creates audit_logs entries and user notifications on approve/reject

features.name: Edge Function Modernization
features.description: Migrated admin-kyb-verify, gateway-merchant-kyb, gateway-merchant-kyb-review, business-kyc-submit from deprecated serve() to Deno.serve()

features.name: Automated Stripe Card Payouts
features.description: Card withdrawals are now fully automated via Stripe Refunds/Transfers API with no admin approval required

features.name: Automated Flutterwave Payouts
features.description: Bank transfer and MoMo payouts via Flutterwave are fully automated with instant provider API calls

features.name: Automated PayPal Payouts
features.description: PayPal batch payouts are fully automated with OAuth2 token management and status tracking

features.name: Payout Webhook Handler
features.description: Unified webhook endpoint receiving async status updates from Stripe, Flutterwave, and PayPal to auto-finalize payouts

features.name: Payout Status Poller
features.description: Background poller (5-min cron) that checks all processing payouts, auto-finalizes completed ones, and auto-fails payouts older than 24 hours with balance reversal

features.name: Auto-Reversal on Failure
features.description: Failed payouts automatically reverse the wallet debit and create audit trail entries

features.name: Credit Events System
features.description: Immutable credit_events table with 8 event types for event-sourced credit scoring

features.name: Credit Scoring Engine
features.description: Deterministic scoring engine computing scores 300-850 from credit events

features.name: Loan Repayment ↔ Credit Score Link
features.description: loan-repay now emits on-time/late credit events and returns optional credit_score

features.name: Overdue Detection Job
features.description: loan-overdue-detect finds missed installments past 3-day grace, deduplicates via missed_event_created flag

features.name: Savings ↔ Credit Score Link
features.description: savings-deposit/withdraw emit credit events with appropriate weights

features.name: Credit Scoring API Endpoints
features.description: GET profile, events, explain; POST recompute
